allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\This PC\\Gravity\\SIDE APPS\\workstation"; $query = "SELECT ec.id, ec.baseId, ec.shopId, ec.shopName, ec.tokenExpiry, ec.lastSynced, b.name as baseName FROM EtsyConnection ec JOIN Base b ON ec.baseId = b.id"; & "C:\\Users\\This PC\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python313\\python.exe" -c "import sqlite3,json; conn=sqlite3.connect\('dev.db'\); conn.row_factory=sqlite3.Row; cur=conn.cursor\(\); cur.execute\('$query'\); rows=[dict\(r\) for r in cur.fetchall\(\)]; print\(json.dumps\(rows,indent=2\)\); conn.close\(\)" 2>&1)
